profile_backing.source: current-main RCH criterion linalg profile after frankenjax-sn7f2 closeout

top_rows.name: linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64
top_rows.note: Top row, but direct GEMM remains blocked by the exact-order floating-point contract.

focused_baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-z9iya-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/lu_1024x1024_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 8 --noplot

candidate.lever: std::simd lane-wise row-tail AXPY for real LU panel and triangular-solve updates
candidate.description: Added an 8-lane helper for row[j] -= factor * pivot[j] and used it in lu_factor_real_scalar, blocked-panel rank-1 updates, and the blocked U12 forward solve.

rebench.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-z9iya-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/lu_1024x1024_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 8 --noplot

proof_result.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-z9iya-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib lu -- --nocapture

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate preserved pivot scan, row swaps, column/row/t loop order, and the per-element update sequence for each LU output.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: Pivot tie behavior was unchanged because the pivot metric and comparison stayed scalar and unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate only processed independent columns in SIMD lanes for the same scalar row[j] -= factor * pivot[j] operation; no horizontal reduction, mixed precision, or reassociation was introduced.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: LU consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No public dtype, shape, or error surface changed in candidate state; final production source was restored.

validation.details: rustfmt would reflow existing Cholesky/eig/complex-test regions outside the LU diff; file was not broad-formatted to avoid unrelated churn.

alien_source.applied_slice: Tried lane-wise AXPY for LU panel and triangular-solve row tails.

next_primitive.target: reprofile current main and avoid LU row-tail SIMD AXPY; choose a materially different LU/GEMM primitive such as layout-copy removal or direct subtract-into Schur update
next_primitive.reason: The lane-wise helper increased overhead enough to regress LU1024 despite proof passing.
next_primitive.target_ratio: >=2.0 score gate with same-worker RCH A/B and unchanged golden sha256
proof_obligations: floating-point operation order unchanged unless a separate behavior-contract bead admits tolerance
